Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of LionTech Innovations Ltd. (proposed SGX Mainboard issuer) by Tamarin Capital Pte. Ltd.
Parties: Seller — LionTech Innovations Ltd. (UEN 202412345Z); Buyer — Tamarin Capital Pte. Ltd. (UEN 201812345K).
Structure & Price: Buyer to acquire 51% of issued shares via share purchase agreement; consideration S$1.20 per share, subject to adjustments.
Funding & Settlement: Escrow to be placed with Tamarin Bank Ltd. (BIC: TMBKSGSG), Account No.: 012-345-678-901; completion funds payable in SGD.
Conditions Precedent: SGX-ST and shareholder approvals (Companies Act 1967), PDPA-compliant consents for employee and customer data, no material adverse change.
MNPI & Conduct: Parties acknowledge receipt of information that may constitute MNPI under the SFA and SGX Listing Rules; no dealing in LionTech securities until information is generally available.
Disclosure & Announcements: Any SGX announcement to be coordinated with SGX RegCo; no selective disclosure under Listing Rule 703.
Contact (Seller IR): ir@liontech.test; Tel: +65 6123 4567; Registered office: 88 Meridian Park #10-01, Singapore 049999.
Signatory (Seller): Ms. Tan Mei Lin, Chief Executive Officer; Passport No.: K1234567Z (provided solely for KYC with escrow agent).
Signatory (Buyer): Mr. David Ong, Managing Director; Email: david.ong@tamarincap.test; Notification address: 1 Tamarin Street #22-01, Singapore 059999.
Employment & PDPA: Key employee retention pool S$1,000,000; personal data transfers to be limited to purpose of transaction, with NRIC and FIN numbers masked except where legally required.
Negative Example (Do Not Use): Public helpline 1800 123 4567 is not an authorised transaction contact channel and must not appear on deal notices.
Bait Identifier (Invalid): The placeholder “NRIC: S1234567A (invalid checksum)” must not be recorded in any KYC file or form.
Long-Stop & Fees: Long-stop date 30 November 2026; break fee S$500,000 if regulatory approvals (including SGX and MAS) are not obtained by the long-stop.
Notices: All notices to “Chief Legal Counsel, LionTech Innovations Ltd.” via legal@liontech.test; do not address notices to “Name of Director: ______” or other form placeholders.
Governing Law & Confidentiality: Governed by Singapore law; this term sheet is confidential, non-binding (save for confidentiality, costs, and governing law), and may contain PDPA-protected data.
